heading: Use of foreign documented oil spill response vessels
label: 55113 Use of foreign documented oil spill response vessels
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5511346:12101 note., , .Pub. L. 104–324, title XI, § 1117110 Stat. 3973Oct. 19, 1996
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)5511346:12101 note., , .Pub. L. 104–324, title XI, § 1117110 Stat. 3973Oct. 19, 1996

children.text: an adequate number and type of oil spill response vessels documented under the laws of the United States cannot be engaged to recover oil from an oil spill in or near those waters in a timely manner, as determined by the Federal On-Scene Coordinator for a discharge or threat of a discharge of oil; and
the foreign country has by its laws accorded to vessels of the United States the same privileges accorded to vessels of the foreign country under this section.
